identityNorthStar: The person behind all these domains: grounded, positive, present. The guy people feel better around — not performing, just being. Calm energy, real conversations, no front.

domains.label: Business & Career
domains.threeYearDestination: Deep AI expertise applied to domains I love — entrepreneurship, markets, poker, meditation, and consciousness.
domains.now: Prioritize AI fluency and minimum two deep-work blocks/day on high-leverage output.
domains.ninetyDay: Reduce lone-wolf work patterns and increase exposure to compounding opportunities with aligned people.
domains.threeYear: Build/lead mission-driven work with trusted collaborators (finance, therapy, meditation, or productivity impact).

domains.label: Finances
domains.threeYearDestination: Strengthen capital trajectory toward eight-figure optionality through focused, high-upside value creation.
domains.now: Keep compounding systems steady and tie major spending decisions to explicit long-term intent.
domains.ninetyDay: Align cashflow and planning to support habit transformation without breaking long-horizon investing discipline.
domains.threeYear: Strengthen capital trajectory toward eight-figure optionality through focused, high-upside value creation.

domains.label: Health
domains.threeYearDestination: 200 lbs with an athletic Olympic lifter build.
domains.now: Hit planned gym sessions, run protein-first meals, prioritize sleep quality and emotional regulation during stress.
domains.ninetyDay: Stabilize training + nutrition to avoid binge/crash cycles; lock in sleep and regulation habits that keep mood and focus stable.
domains.threeYear: Maintain best shape (about 200 lb), longevity-focused routine, consistent training base, and a clear regulated mind through nervous-system care.

domains.label: Family & Friends
domains.threeYearDestination: Active local community I'm embedded in.
domains.now: Reduce isolation with deliberate weekly social contact.
domains.ninetyDay: Build a local positive-sum friend base. Be the person who brings good energy to the room — not forced, just natural.
domains.threeYear: Live in a deeply connected social life with active community rhythm. Known as someone who lifts the vibe and makes people feel at ease.

domains.label: Romance
domains.threeYearDestination: A partner with shared vision — growing together, becoming the best versions of ourselves.
domains.ninetyDay: Resolve long-distance relationship direction with integrity.
domains.threeYear: Committed partner growing together with shared vision.

domains.label: Personal Growth
domains.threeYearDestination: Calm, resilient, self-aware — understanding my own tendencies through meditation and AI. Consistently curious — reading, exploring, never stagnant. 3 years clean from weed, alcohol, and all substances.
domains.now: Keep daily reflection/journaling and meditation active; protect sobriety streaks and interrupt urges immediately.
domains.ninetyDay: Convert reflection outputs into rule updates; complete dopamine reset with reliable replacement behaviors for weed, LoL, and poker triggers.
domains.threeYear: Live from a mature inner framework where philosophy, meditation, and self-knowledge guide decisions; non-negotiable sobriety systems with low relapse volatility. The inner calm that makes the positive energy natural, not effortful.

domains.label: Fun & Recreation
domains.threeYearDestination: Have a full, chosen weekend life where home is restful by choice, not default isolation.
domains.now: Replace at least one zero-sum leisure loop with a positive-sum activity that creates energy and connection.
domains.ninetyDay: Establish recurring hobbies that are restorative and social, not isolating or numbing.
domains.threeYear: Have a full, chosen weekend life where home is restful by choice, not default isolation.

domains.label: Physical Environment
domains.threeYearDestination: Proximity to hobbies and community, access to nature, walkable.
